basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) Psychologist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nimhans.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIMHANS Psychologist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's in Psychology / MSW (Medical and Psychiatry)
qualification.details: Master's in Psychology / MSW (Medical and Psychiatry) with experience in administering psychological assessments. Applicant should be fluent in spoken and written English, Telugu, and Hindi languages.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIMHANS Psychologist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIMHANS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIMHANS Psychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIMHANS Psychologist position is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Psychologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Psychology or an MSW (Medical and Psychiatry) with relevant experience in administering psychological assessments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the NIMHANS Psychologist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Psychologist post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Psychologist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Psychologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Psychologist in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIMHANS Psychologist recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required language skills for the Psychologist post?
faq.answer: Applicants must be fluent in spoken and written English, Telugu, and Hindi languages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the NIMHANS Psychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written test or interview, and potentially a skill test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
